user.title: Petlibro Local Setup
user.description: Choose how to set up your Petlibro feeder.

auto_detect.title: Auto-detect Device
auto_detect.description:
This will scan for your Petlibro feeder.

Make sure:
1. **mqtt.us.petlibro.com** resolves to your HA IP (via DNS override)
2. The feeder is powered on and connected to Wi-Fi

The integration will first check the existing MQTT broker. If the feeder isn't found, it will **temporarily stop Mosquitto** (~2 minutes) to capture your feeder's credentials directly, then restart Mosquitto with the correct login.

Click **Submit** to start scanning.

auto_detect_confirm.title: Device Found
auto_detect_confirm.description:
Discovered feeder **{serial}** on your MQTT broker.

MQTT credentials have been automatically configured in Mosquitto.

**Note:** After completing setup, the feeder may take up to **2 minutes** to reconnect and start reporting data. This is normal — the feeder needs to re-establish its MQTT connection after the credential capture process.

manual.title: Manual Setup
manual.description:
Enter your feeder's serial number and MQTT credentials.

The serial number (DL_DEVICE_ID) is on the bottom of the feeder or in the Petlibro app. The MQTT credentials (DL_PRODUCT_KEY / DL_PRODUCT_SECRET) are the same for all devices of the same model.

error.no_devices_found: No Petlibro feeders detected. Check that the DNS redirect is active and the feeder is connected to Wi-Fi.
error.mqtt_unavailable: HA's MQTT integration is not available. Set up Mosquitto first.
error.cannot_stop_mosquitto: Could not stop Mosquitto add-on. Ensure you are running HA OS with the Mosquitto add-on installed.
